query.sparql:
SELECT ?brooke_state ?colin_state
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q54991517 AS ?brooke) .
  BIND(wd:Q110994531 AS ?colin) .
  ?brooke wdt:P131 ?brooke_state .
  ?colin wdt:P131 ?colin_state .
  FILTER (?brooke_state = ?colin_state) .
}

can i play don't starve on play station 4?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?game ?platform
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q15734374 .
  ?game wdt:P400 ?platform .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?platform), "PlayStation 4")) .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?game), "Don't Starve")) .
}

question.string: How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P3975 wd:Q1051483 .
  FILTER (?item != wd:Q765165) .
  ?item wdt:P569 ?birth .
  wd:Q765165 wdt:P569 ?brezhnevBirth .
  FILTER (?birth < ?brezhnevBirth)
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?position .
  ?position wdt:P279* wd:Q11696 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) > 1990) .
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?medal ?event
WHERE {
  wd:Q734464 wdt:P2522 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P361 wd:Q2188 .
  ?medal wdt:P710 ?event .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?event), "2020 Summer Olympics")
}

question.string: Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?
Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?startYear ?endYear
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q25369 AS ?kobe).
  BIND(wd:Q36159 AS ?lebron).
  ?kobe p:P54 ?kobeMember.
  ?lebron p:P54 ?lebronMember.
  ?kobeMember ps:P54 wd:Q127846.
  ?lebronMember ps:P54 wd:Q127846.
  ?kobeMember pq:P580 ?kobeStart.
  ?kobeMember pq:P582 ?kobeEnd.
  ?lebronMember pq:P580 ?lebronStart.
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?kobeMember pq:P582 ?kobeEnd2. FILTER (?kobeEnd2 < ?lebronStart) }
  BIND(YEAR(?kobeEnd) AS ?endYear).
  BIND(YEAR(?lebronStart) AS ?startYear).
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?director ?titanicDirector
WHERE {
  wd:Q58815001 wdt:P57 ?director .
  wd:Q568 !wdt:P57 ?director .
  FILTER (NOT EXISTS { ?director wdt:P57 wd:Q568 })
  FILTER (NOT EXISTS { ?director wdt:P1037 wd:Q568 })
  BIND (?director AS ?titanicDirector)
}

question.string: Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?company wdt:P161 "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

question.string: What is the second letter in the Greek alphabet?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  wd:Q8216 wdt:P1881 ?list .
  ?list ps:P1684 ?inscription .
  BIND(REPLACE(STR(?inscription), "α", "") AS ?filtered) .
  BIND(SUBSTR(?filtered, 1, 1) AS ?secondLetter) .
  BIND(REPLACE(STR(?secondLetter), "β", "beta") AS ?beta) .
  ?item wdt:P487 ?beta .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}

question.string: Was it the cancer that caused the death of Steve Jobs who was the CEO of Apple?
Was Shaquille O'Neal the teammate of Kobe Bryant in the year of 2000?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?year
WHERE {
  ?player1 wdt:P569 ?dob1 .
  ?player1 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?player2 wdt:P569 ?dob2 .
  ?player2 wdt:P54 ?team .
  ?player1 wdt:P1129 ?appearances1 .
  ?player2 wdt:P1129 ?appearances2 .
  FILTER (?player1 = wd:Q43935) .
  FILTER (?player2 = wd:Q40331) .
  BIND(YEAR(?dob1) AS ?year1) .
  BIND(YEAR(?dob2) AS ?year2) .
  FILTER (?year1 < 2000) .
  FILTER (?year2 < 2000) .
  BIND(2000 AS ?year) .
}

question.string: What came first: the TV show The Flintstones or the end of racial discrimination in voting in the US ?
What colors does the German national flag have?
What did the suffragettes stand for?
What do you call a female form of an emperor in English?
What event killed the most people in the years 1910 to 1920?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event ?eventLabel (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P20 ?place .
  ?person wdt:P509 ?event .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1910) .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) <= 1920) .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?date .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?event ?eventLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel (SUM(?number) AS ?total)
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q34370 AS ?item) .
  ?item wdt:P3989 ?occupation .
  ?occupation wdt:P106 ?job .
  ?item wdt:P1641 ?port .
  ?item p:P1174 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1174 ?number .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
  FILTER(?job = wd:Q1254035)
} GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel

query.sparql:
SELECT ?title ?movie
WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(STR(YEAR(?releaseDate)) = "2020") .
  ?movie wdt:P161 ?actor .
  ?actor wdt:P735 "Carey Mulligan"@en .
  ?movie wdt:P1476 ?title .
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?game) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P577 ?releaseYear .
  wd:Q24514682 wdt:P577 ?dbdReleaseYear .
  FILTER (?releaseYear = ?dbdReleaseYear) .
  FILTER (?game != wd:Q24514682) .
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q7889 .
}

query.sparql:
SELECT ?institution (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q1381869 .
  ?winner wdt:P69 ?education .
  ?education wdt:P769 ?institution .
}
GROUP BY ?institution
HAVING ((COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner)) > 1)

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?season) AS ?seasonCount)
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q39715 .
  ?season wdt:P2522 ?team .
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q3948704 .
}
GROUP BY ?team ?teamLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonCount)
